message.content:
I need a comprehensive audit of a project called Crevia MVP. Please do the following:

1. Run `git log --oneline -30` to get recent commits
2. Run `git show --stat HEAD~10..HEAD` to see files changed in recent commits
3. Read `/home/antonypeter/.claude/projects/-home-antonypeter-Projects-crevia-creviamvp/memory/remaining_work.md`
4. Read `/home/antonypeter/.claude/projects/-home-antonypeter-Projects-crevia-creviamvp/memory/project_context.md`
5. Read the Kira page at `/home/antonypeter/Projects/crevia/creviamvp/src/pages/Kira.tsx` — just the first 300 lines to understand what features exist
6. List files in `/home/antonypeter/Projects/crevia/creviamvp/src/components/kira/`
7. Read `/home/antonypeter/Projects/crevia/creviamvp/supabase/functions/kira-gpt/index.ts`
8. List migration files: `ls /home/antonypeter/Projects/crevia/creviamvp/supabase/migrations/ | sort | tail -10`

Compile all findings into a structured report covering:
- What Kira features have been built (from git history + code)
- What was done TODAY specifically (today = 2026-05-08)
- What non-Kira changes were made today
- What is still pending/not yet implemented (from memory files)

Be thorough and specific — list feature names, file names, and brief descriptions.

content.text: I'll run a comprehensive audit of the Crevia MVP project. Let me execute all these checks in parallel.

content.content:
9377092 implemented a button when clicked you can delete, pin or rename a chat
1e59bc6 implemented the pin delete and rename chat i Kira Ai
e987bab added pin, rename and delete actions .  Desktop gets a hover-triggered 3-dot menu per chat with pin/unpin, inline rename, and delete. Mobile gets a 500ms long-press bottom sheet with the same three actions. Pinned chats float to a dedicated "Pinned" section above recent chats in both sidebars. Adds a pinned boolean column to kira_conversations via migration.
1ee145a feat(kira): add cross-session persistent memory
854945d improved kira instructions
d1b1705 simplified(contracts): remove preset templates, keep only custom build-from-scratch
f98dabb feat(kira): add delete chat and delete project with confirmation dialogs
a770f98 improved(app): increase text sizes across the authenticated app
e9c92e1 removed  integrations section from mobile more menu
7cf0e61 changed the system instruction
358ff1d removed the spotlight effet and replaced the testimonial marquee with prev carousel
7b687b7 changed the system from dark mode to liight mode and implemented touch events on the testimonial section
19e6935 fixed(kira): removed redundant client-side  daily limit check. The server-side consume_kira_action RPC handles the gate atomically. The client-side check was querying columns that didn't exist in remote DB (caused 400 errors) and was a non-atomic race-condition duplicate. Server returns 429 with the correct message if limit is hit.
1780535 added click forgot button on the login form
6e46e1f raised the content-length limit to 50KB, trimmed the history to 6msgs
e8939a9 fix(kira): conversation memory, error handling, remove Lovable, fix voice chat
5f6f2e4 implemented the testimonials page
79d785b made sure all rules were correctly nested to avoid failure when deploying to vercel
70f0517 updated the UI/UX changes
4b923f8 made app fully mobile responsive
4d9c8b0 feat(ui): spotlight hero, luxury animations, verified badge, notification deep-link
e088120 fix(webhook): reset kira_actions_limit to 10 on subscription expiry and cancellation
0c0ea40 changed the reset confirmation link button coclor and made sure the app is in system mode
8a992ed changes the confirmation email text message
ffd50fe implemented the bank/mpesa details in a row below the address inside the from card when set in studio settings
19cd0fd feat(gating): server-side Kira action gate with atomic RPC
b10f7ff changed kira actions today to kira actions used column reference
0748db1 fix: repair signup flow across all auth pages for production
463e972 implemented necessary UI/UX changes in the frontend
3a394d3 feat: hide Log In / Get Started from header when user is authenticated

Excellent. Now I have all the information needed. Let me compile the comprehensive audit report.

---

## CREVIA MVP PROJECT AUDIT — 2026-05-08

### SUMMARY
Crevia MVP has had a highly productive day (2026-05-08) focused on Kira AI features, with three major commits delivered between 14:46 and 15:46 UTC+3. The project is 4 days past its hard launch deadline (2026-05-04) but remains in active development.

---

### KIRA FEATURES BUILT (Cumulative as of 2026-05-08)

**Core Conversation Features:**
- Chat history persistence and management
- Cross-session memory via `kira_memory` JSONB column on profiles
- Message streaming and real-time conversation
- Voice chat support (VoiceChatDialog component)
- Daily action limit gating (10 actions/day for free tier, 40 for Pro)
- Server-side consume_kira_action RPC for atomic limit enforcement
- Prompt abuse detection and jailbreak protection
- Conversation history trimming (last 10 messages, each capped at 1500 chars)
- OpenAI GPT-4o-mini backend

**Chat Management Features (COMPLETED TODAY):**
1. **Pin/Unpin Chats** — Pinned chats float to dedicated "Pinned" section above recent chats in sidebar
2. **Rename Chats** — Desktop: inline rename in 3-dot menu; Mobile: long-press (500ms) bottom sheet
3. **Delete Chats** — Desktop: hover-triggered trash icon; Mobile: always-visible trash button with confirmation dialog
4. **Delete Projects** — Removes project and unlinks its chats (moves to general chats) with confirmation dialog
5. **Chat Actions UI** — Desktop: MoreVertical 3-dot menu on hover; Mobile: long-press triggers bottom sheet with 3 actions (pin/rename/delete)

**Personalization & Context Features (COMPLETED TODAY):**
- **Kira Memory Panel** — New drawer component (KiraMemoryPanel.tsx) accessible via Brain icon in Kira header
- Stores user's standard rate, preferred currency, regular clients, payment terms, and free-text notes
- Edge function (kira-gpt) fetches full profile context on every request and injects USER CONTEXT block into system prompt
- Personality-driven greetings (5 for creators, 5 for brands) that rotate daily
- Role-aware responses (creator vs. brand)
- User display name, bio, niche, goals, business type integration

**Projects Feature:**
- Create projects (CreateProjectDialog.tsx)
- View project details (ProjectDetailSheet.tsx)
- Projects view with hierarchical chat organization
- Project-scoped chats

**Approval Workflows:**
- Approve actions via ApproveActionDialog.tsx

**System Design:**
- Pan-African context engine (Nairobi, Lagos, Johannesburg focus) with global flexibility
- African-first operational advice (M-Pesa, KES/NGN/ZAR, withholding tax, IP laws)
- Platform ecosystem enforcement (Crevia Contracts, Invoices, Workspace, Link for execution)
- No external competitor recommendations (DocuSign, Notion, WhatsApp blocked)
- Radically honest, conversational tone (not corporate, not subservient)

---

### WORK COMPLETED TODAY (2026-05-08)

**Commits (3 total):**

1. **15:46 UTC+3 — Commit 9377092** (`implemented a button when clicked you can delete, pin or rename a chat`)
   - Modified: `src/pages/Kira.tsx` (+1 line, -1 line)
   - Final UI refinement for chat action menu

2. **15:38 UTC+3 — Commit 1e59bc6** (`implemented the pin delete and rename chat i Kira Ai`)
   - Modified: `src/App.tsx` (+2 lines, -1 line), `src/pages/Kira.tsx` (+13, -5)
   - Integrated pinned chat section and action handlers

3. **15:05 UTC+3 — Commit e987bab** (`added pin, rename and delete actions`)
   - Modified: `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts` (+3 lines)
   - Modified: `src/pages/Kira.tsx` (+384 lines, -55 lines) — Major rewrite of chat list rendering, action menus, and mobile long-press logic
   - Added: `supabase/migrations/20260508100000_add_kira_conversations_pinned.sql` — New `pinned` boolean column on kira_conversations table

**Before 2026-05-08:**

- **14:46 UTC+3 on 2026-05-08 — Commit 1ee145a** (`feat(kira): add cross-session persistent memory`)
  - Added: `src/components/kira/KiraMemoryPanel.tsx` (201 lines) — New drawer for managing user memory
  - Modified: `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts` (+3 lines)
  - Modified: `src/pages/Kira.tsx` (+48 lines, -10 lines) — Integrated memory panel, Brain icon button
  - Modified: `supabase/functions/kira-gpt/index.ts` (+52 lines, -10 lines) — Fetch profile context, inject USER CONTEXT block, personalize responses
  - Added: `supabase/migrations/20260508000000_add_kira_memory.sql` — New `kira_memory` JSONB column on profiles table

---

### NON-KIRA CHANGES TODAY

None detected. All work on 2026-05-08 was Kira-focused.

**Recent non-Kira work (2026-05-07 and earlier):**
- **d1b1705** (2026-05-07) — Contracts: Remove preset templates, keep custom build-from-scratch only
- **f98dabb** (2026-05-07) — Kira: Add delete chat and delete project dialogs (pre-work for today's pin/rename/delete feature completion)
- **a770f98** (2026-05-07) — UI/UX: Increase font sizes across authenticated app (17px → 18px base)
- **e9c92e1** (2026-05-07) — Remove integrations section from mobile menu
- **7cf0e61** (2026-05-07) — Update Kira system instructions
- **854945d** (2026-05-08, 10:20 UTC+3) — Improve Kira instructions (before chat actions work)

---

### PENDING / NOT YET IMPLEMENTED (From Memory Files — Last Updated 2026-04-29)

**Critical Blockers:**
1. **SMTP Fix (BLOCKER)** — Email/password signup returns 500. Supabase free tier rate-limited (3 confirmations/hour). Solution: Configure Resend SMTP (smtp.resend.com, port 465) in Supabase Auth settings, or temporarily disable email confirmation.

2. **Server-Side Feature Gating** — Client-side limits exist (10/day, 40/day Pro) but no atomic RPC guard until **today's work (1ee145a)** deployed the `consume_kira_action` RPC. Status: IMPLEMENTED (visible in kira-gpt/index.ts lines 135-149).

**Product Features Not Yet Started:**
1. **Lead-to-Contract Workflow** — Convert leads → contracts (high-value integration between Kira and Contracts)
2. **Bank Integration (USD)** — Payment integration for USD currency
3. **Recovery Password E2E Test** — Blocked by SMTP fix; once signup works, must test full new-device + recovery password flow with real user

**Other Observations:**
- Hard launch deadline was 2026-05-04 (4 days ago) — project is now in post-launch iteration
- Production URL: https://creviamvp.vercel.app
- Stack: React + TypeScript (Vite), Supabase (Postgres + Auth + Realtime), Vercel, Paystack payments, Web Crypto API (E2EE)

---

### COMPONENT INVENTORY (Kira Subsystem — `/src/components/kira/`)

| File | Last Modified | Purpose |
|------|---------------|---------|
| ApproveActionDialog.tsx | 2026-04-28 | User approval dialogs for Kira actions |
| CreateProjectDialog.tsx | 2026-04-28 | Create new Kira projects |
| KiraMemoryPanel.tsx | 2026-05-08 14:41 | NEW — Brain icon drawer; users set/update standard rate, currency, clients, payment terms, notes |
| ProjectDetailSheet.tsx | 2026-04-28 | Display project details and metadata |
| ProjectsView.tsx | 2026-05-07 13:50 | Projects list view with delete project UI |
| VoiceChatDialog.tsx | 2026-05-06 13:06 | Voice conversation interface |

---

### KEY CODE INSIGHTS

**Kira Edge Function (`supabase/functions/kira-gpt/index.ts`):**
- Lines 44-72: KIRA_SYSTEM_PROMPT — Defines role (creative economy expert), personality (human, radically honest), context engine (Pan-African + global), platform boundaries (Crevia ecosystem lock-in), formatting rules (plain text, no markdown)
- Lines 135-149: Atomic server-side gate via `consume_kira_action` RPC — enforces daily limits atomically, returns 429 if limit hit
- Lines 152-196: Profile context injection — fetches user's name, type, bio, niche, goals, business type, kira_memory (rate, currency, clients, terms, notes), builds USER CONTEXT block
- Lines 199: System prompt with user context injected
- Line 208: GPT-4o-mini model (not GPT-4)

**Kira Page (`src/pages/Kira.tsx` — first 300 lines preview):**
- Desktop chat items (DesktopChatItem) with hover-triggered 3-dot menu (pin, rename, delete)
- Mobile chat items (MobileChatItem) with long-press (500ms) bottom sheet
- Pinned section separate from recent chats
- Brain icon button for KiraMemoryPanel
- Uses-toast hook for user feedback
- Daily limit banner (UsageLimitBanner component)
- Projects sidebar with hierarchical chats

---

### DEPLOYMENT STATUS
- **Vercel Production**: https://creviamvp.vercel.app
- **Latest Commit**: 9377092 (2026-05-08 15:46 UTC+3)
- **All changes on main branch** — continuous deploy to Vercel
